title: Wuxi, Jiangsu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Wuxi, Jiangsu: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Wuxi is a city in Jiangsu with a population of 7,462,000. A wealthy city on Lake Taihu, known for its scenic lakeside, historic gardens, and strong manufacturing and solar energy industries.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
